nasb.text: But the righteousness based on faith speaks as follows: “Do not say in your heart, ‘Who will ascend into heaven?’ (that is, to bring Christ down),

esv.text: But the righteousness based on faith says, “Do not say in your heart, ‘Who will ascend into heaven?’” (that is, to bring Christ down)

cnv.text: 但那出於信心的義卻這樣說：“你心裡不要說：‘誰要升到天上去呢？’

ccb.text: 但是论到以信心为基础的义，圣经上说：“不要心里说，‘谁要升到天上去呢？’意思是谁要把基督领下来，

csbs.text: 而有关本于信的义，却这样吩咐：“你心里不用说：谁要升到天上去？”——这意思是要把基督带下来；
